description: Complete DNA profile for every Windy Pro model. Single source of truth. All IDs, names, and HF repos are canonical — everything else derives from this file.

models.name: Windy Lite
models.notes: ⚠️ High eval loss (4.180) for its size class — Concorde spelling divergence detected. LoRA may have introduced regression artifact. RECOMMENDATION: Investigate Concorde spelling issue, retrain with larger/cleaner dataset. A whisper-base model should achieve eval loss < 2.0.

models.name: Windy Edge
models.notes: ⚠️ High eval loss (4.814) — ROOT CAUSE: English-only LoRA (LibriSpeech) applied to multilingual model (whisper-large-v2). The LoRA likely degrades multilingual performance rather than helping. RECOMMENDATION: Retrain with multilingual dataset (Common Voice, VoxPopuli) or remove LoRA and apply multilingual-aware fine-tuning. Base model is strong — it works despite the LoRA, not because of it.

models.name: Windy Lite (CPU)
models.notes: INT8 quantized from windy-lite. ⚠️ Inherits high eval loss (4.180) and Concorde spelling divergence from parent. See windy-lite notes.

models.name: Windy Edge (CPU)
models.notes: INT8 quantized from windy-edge. ⚠️ Inherits high eval loss (4.814) from parent — English LoRA on multilingual model mismatch. See windy-edge notes for root cause and retraining recommendation.

models.name: Windy Translate Spark
models.notes: Lightweight multilingual generalist Size corrected 11Mar26 — was 480 MB (pre-upload estimate), actual on HuggingFace is 929 MB.

models.name: Windy Translate Standard
models.notes: Full-size multilingual generalist Size corrected 11Mar26 — was 850 MB (pre-upload estimate), actual on HuggingFace is 2,371 MB.

cert.inference_output: Invalid input features shape: expected an input with shape (1, 128, 3000), but got an input with sha
